displayProperties.name: Silkstrike
displayProperties.description:
Weave a vicious rope dart and tear through your targets.

[Light Attack]  : Swing the rope dart in front of you to deal damage. The tip of the dart deals bonus damage, and defeating targets with the tip causes them to explode.

[Heavy Attack]  : Swing the rope dart in a circular motion to deal heavy damage all around you.

[Grenade]  : Use the grapple to move forward quickly.

displayProperties.name: Vestigial Alchemy
displayProperties.description:
This weapon gains energy when you pick up Vestiges and allows you to create ammo at the projectile impact point for you and your allies. Special ammo mode unlocks at 50% energy, while Heavy ammo mode unlocks at 100% energy. 

To transform Vestiges into Special ammo, [Alternate Weapon Action]  to activate Special ammo mode. [Alternate Weapon Action]  a second time to activate Heavy ammo mode.

displayProperties.description: Equip this weapon ornament to change the appearance of Vigilance Wing. Once you get an ornament, it's unlocked for all characters on your account.

displayProperties.name: Chemflesh Gauntlets
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Sidearm Dexterity
displayProperties.description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

displayProperties.name: Division Computed
displayProperties.description: Modifications for your ship's transmat systems, so you'll always arrive in style.

displayProperties.name: Uzume RR4
displayProperties.description: Equip this tier 5 weapon ornament to change the appearance of this weapon.

displayProperties.name: Serve the Colony
displayProperties.description: Insectoid robot grenades quickly repopulate the magazine from reserves while the Colony is unequipped.

displayProperties.name: Upgrade Armor
displayProperties.description: Upgrade this armor to improve its 3 lowest stats by 1, up to a maximum of 5 in each when upgraded to a Masterwork.

displayProperties.name: Energy Transfer
displayProperties.description: Guarding while receiving damage generates class ability energy.

displayProperties.name: Arc Armor Glow
displayProperties.description:
Equip this ornament to enhance the appearance of your Solstice armor with an Arc-aligned armor glow.

The effect shines brightest when equipped with a matching subclass.

displayProperties.name: Banner Staff
displayProperties.description: Your inaugural staff for Clan Banners.

displayProperties.name: Taken Knife Boots
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Trait Locked
displayProperties.description: Reshaping an enhanced trait in the fourth column's trait perk requires the weapon to be upgraded to Enhancement 3.

displayProperties.name: Abyss, Inverted
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament to change the appearance of Heart of Inmost Light. Once you get an ornament, it's unlocked for all characters on your account.
